verses.1: In you, LORD, I take refuge.
verses.2: Bow down your ear to me.
verses.3: For you are my rock and my fortress,
verses.4: Pluck me out of the net that they have laid secretly for me,
verses.5: Into your hand I commend my spirit.
verses.6: I hate those who regard lying vanities,
verses.7: I will be glad and rejoice in your loving kindness,
verses.8: You have not shut me up into the hand of the enemy.
verses.9: Have mercy on me, LORD, for I am in distress.
verses.10: For my life is spent with sorrow,
verses.11: Because of all my adversaries I have become utterly contemptible to my neighbors,
verses.12: I am forgotten from their hearts like a dead man.
verses.13: For I have heard the slander of many, terror on every side,
verses.14: But I trust in you, LORD.
verses.15: My times are in your hand.
verses.16: Make your face to shine on your servant.
verses.17: Let me not be disappointed, LORD, for I have called on you.
verses.18: Let the lying lips be mute,
verses.19: Oh how great is your goodness,
verses.20: In the shelter of your presence you will hide them from the plotting of man.
verses.22: As for me, I said in my haste, “I am cut off from before your eyes.”
verses.23: Oh love the LORD, all you his saints!
verses.24: Be strong, and let your heart take courage,
